description: Meta-fields: action parameters and side effects that are NOT dialogue state. Slots (in finance_slots.json and telecom_slots.json) represent state that persists across turns and is tracked by T1 SOC and T2 SOE. Meta-fields represent transient action inputs (one-time OTP codes, message bodies, dispute reasons) and control signals (await_user_response, notify_team flags) consumed by T3 SAG and T4 MAP but NOT by T1/T2. Mixing meta-fields into required_params without documentation causes evaluation gaps where references cannot be resolved against slot ontology. Documented here per 2026-07-16 audit (P0).

audit_history.introduced: 2026-07-16 (commit 6a21940 'Day 4 revision' added dialogue-flow actions whose required_params reference fields outside the slot ontology)
audit_history.documented: 2026-07-16 (P0 fix — meta-field model formalized here; future work: migrate required_params to separate control_params field)

categories.input_parameter: Data passed into the action that does not persist in dialogue state. Examples: one-time TFA codes, message bodies, candidate values for disambiguation.
categories.control_signal: Side-effect or flag that influences dialogue flow but not slot state. Examples: await_user_response (turn handoff), notify_team (back-office alert).
categories.system_invariant: Internal flag or ticket reference used by back-office systems. Not dialogue-visible but required for action completeness.

message_content.name: message_content
message_content.description: Body text of an agent message (inform_customer).

attachment_url.name: attachment_url
attachment_url.description: URL to a file attached to a message (inform_customer optional).

delivery_channel.name: delivery_channel
delivery_channel.description: Channel used to deliver the message (inform_customer optional).

ambiguous_slot.name: ambiguous_slot
ambiguous_slot.description: Name of the slot whose value is ambiguous (confirm_intent).
ambiguous_slot.note: Holds a slot name (string) referencing an entry in the domain slot ontology.

candidate_values.name: candidate_values
candidate_values.description: List of candidate values for the ambiguous slot (confirm_intent).

disambiguation_question.name: disambiguation_question
disambiguation_question.description: Question text asked to disambiguate the slot (confirm_intent optional).

tfa_code.name: tfa_code
tfa_code.description: One-time password entered by user for TFA (verify_identity_tfa).

set_verified_via_tfa_flag.name: set_verified_via_tfa_flag
set_verified_via_tfa_flag.description: Internal flag set after successful TFA. Acts as a precondition for sensitive actions.

amount.name: amount
amount.description: Monetary amount involved in the request. Distinct from bill_amount (which is state) — amount is the request-time input.

justification.name: justification
justification.description: Free-text justification for the supervisor-approval request (optional).

create_approval_ticket.name: create_approval_ticket
create_approval_ticket.description: Creates a back-office approval ticket (request_supervisor_approval side effect).

await_user_response.name: await_user_response
await_user_response.description: Dialogue-control flag signaling turn handoff back to user (confirm_intent side effect).

payment_method.name: payment_method
payment_method.description: Method of payment for a transaction (telecom pay_bill required, change_billing_cycle optional).

dispute_reason.name: dispute_reason
dispute_reason.description: Reason for disputing a bill charge (telecom dispute_bill).

disputed_transaction_date.name: disputed_transaction_date
disputed_transaction_date.description: Date of the disputed transaction (telecom dispute_bill optional).

create_dispute_status_slot.name: create_dispute_status_slot
create_dispute_status_slot.description: Creates a slot tracking the dispute status (telecom dispute_bill side effect). Note: the actual slot name in finance_slots.json is 'dispute_status' (fraud_info group); this control signal is generic.

notify_fraud_team.name: notify_fraud_team
notify_fraud_team.description: Triggers notification to the fraud investigation team (telecom dispute_bill side effect).

service_type.name: service_type
service_type.description: Type of telecom service affected by outage (telecom report_outage).

outage_location.name: outage_location
outage_location.description: Geographic or address location of the reported outage (telecom report_outage).

affected_since.name: affected_since
affected_since.description: Timestamp when the outage began (telecom report_outage).

affected_devices_count.name: affected_devices_count
affected_devices_count.description: Number of devices affected by the outage (telecom report_outage optional).

create_outage_ticket_id.name: create_outage_ticket_id
create_outage_ticket_id.description: Creates a back-end ticket ID for the outage (telecom report_outage side effect).

notify_ops_team.name: notify_ops_team
notify_ops_team.description: Triggers notification to the network operations team (telecom report_outage side effect).
